info.title: qwen-image-3.0-pro Interface
info.description: Use Qwen model for image editing with simplified model parameter configuration

post.description:
> 🚧 **This model is not yet available, stay tuned**

- The Qwen (qwen-image-3.0-pro) model supports both text-to-image (T2I, no reference image) and image editing (I2I, with 1-3 reference images) modes
- Asynchronous processing mode, use the returned task ID to [query](/en/api-manual/task-management/get-task-detail)
- Generated image links are valid for 24 hours, please save them promptly

value.prompt: An orange cat wearing an astronaut helmet, cyberpunk neon background
Replace the background of this image

error.message: Insufficient quota. Please top up your account.
Token does not have access to model: qwen-image-3.0-pro
Too many requests, please try again later

prompt.description: Prompt describing the image to generate (text-to-image), or how to edit the input image (image editing). Limited to 4500 tokens
prompt.example: Replace the background of this image

image_urls.description:
Reference image URL list (**optional**). Not provided or empty array = text-to-image (T2I); provide 1-3 images = image editing (I2I)

**Note:**
- Number of input images supported per request: `0-3` images, more than 3 will return an error
- Only public http/https image URLs are supported, base64 / data-url is not supported
- Image width and height must both be within the `[384-3072]` pixel range
- Supported file formats: `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`, `.bmp`, `.webp`, `.tiff`
- Image URLs must be directly accessible by the server, or the image URL should directly download when accessed (typically these URLs end with image file extensions, such as `.png`, `.jpg`)

n.description:
Specifies the number of images to generate, supports any integer value between `[1,6]`

**Note:**
- Each request will be pre-charged based on the value of `n`, actual charges are based on the number of images generated

negative_prompt.description:
Negative prompt to describe content you don't want to see in the image, used to constrain the output

**Note:**
- Supports Chinese and English, maximum length of `500` characters, each Chinese character/letter counts as one character, excess will be automatically truncated
negative_prompt.example: low resolution, error, worst quality, low quality, mutilated, extra fingers, bad proportions

size.description:
Dimensions of the generated image. Three approaches are supported:

**Option 1 - Auto (default):**
- `auto`: the model automatically selects an appropriate output size based on the prompt (in this case `quality` has no effect)

**Option 2 - Aspect-ratio format:**
- `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:2`, `3:4`, `4:3`, `4:5`, `5:4`, `9:16`, `16:9`, `21:9`, `9:21`
- Used together with the `quality` parameter; the system automatically converts to the pixels corresponding to the chosen ratio and resolution, with no need to specify them manually

**Option 3 - Pixel format:**
- width×height, e.g. `1024x1024`, `2048x2048`, `2720x1530`, etc.
- Total pixel range: `[262144, 4194304]` (i.e. 512×512 to 2048×2048)
- Aspect-ratio range: `[1/16, 16]`; a side may exceed 2048px
- Both width and height must be greater than `14px`

**Note:**
- `size` and `n` are independent; when `n>1` you can still specify a size/ratio
- When `size` is omitted, it defaults to `auto`

prompt_extend.description: Whether to enable intelligent prompt rewriting. Default value is `false` (does not rewrite the user's prompt without permission); only when explicitly set to `true` will a large model be used to optimize the positive prompt, with noticeable improvement for insufficiently descriptive or simpler prompts

watermark.description: Whether to add "Qwen-Image" watermark to the bottom right corner of the image. Default value is `false`

seed.description:
Random seed, range `[0, 2147483647]`, using the same seed value can keep generated content relatively stable

**Note:**
- If not provided, the algorithm will automatically use a random seed
- Model generation process is probabilistic, even with the same seed, results cannot be guaranteed to be completely identical each time

callback_url.description:
HTTPS callback address after task completion

**Callback Timing:**
- Triggered when task is completed, failed, or cancelled
- Sent after billing confirmation is completed

**Security Restrictions:**
- Only HTTPS protocol is supported
- Callback to internal IP addresses is prohibited (127.0.0.1, 10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, 192.168.x.x, etc.)
- URL length must not exceed `2048` characters

**Callback Mechanism:**
- Timeout: `10` seconds
- Maximum `3` retries on failure (retries after `1` second/`2` seconds/`4` seconds)
- Callback response body format is consistent with the task query API response format
- Callback address returning 2xx status code is considered successful, other status codes will trigger retry

can_cancel.description: Whether the task can be cancelled

bearerAuth.description:
##All APIs require Bearer Token authentication##

**Get API Key:**

Visit [API Key Management Page](https://evolink.ai/dashboard/keys) to get your API Key

**Add to request header:**
```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```
